content.en:
Ye Tian copied his body, and this time he did not act as a Dark King, but left the human world as a Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor.

Of course, there is almost no shortage of equipment that this body should have, otherwise the combat effectiveness will be sharply reduced.

Ye Tian left the human realm in order to compete for a medium-sized forbidden void realm that had just been born, so it was not surprising that he came out this time.

The powerhouses of the Heavenly Emperor Palace have been staring at the human realm, so after Ye Tian came out of the human realm, he was quickly locked by the powerhouses of the Heavenly Emperor Palace and reported to the many palace masters of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Ye Tian had been hiding his breath, so no one knew that he was already in the realm of the Invincible Dao Ancestor, and thought that he was the strongest Dao Ancestor!

......

Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

When the Golden Crow Palace Lord learned that Ye Tian had come out of the human realm and went to the forbidden void realm that had just appeared, he decided to send a half-step domain ancestor to intercept and kill Ye Tian.

Immediately, the five palace masters, the Qinglong Palace Lord, the True Martial Palace Lord, the Vermilion Bird Palace Lord, the Heavenly Wolf Palace Lord, and the Starry Sky Palace Lord, were ready to intercept and kill Ye Tian.

If the half-step domain ancestors under the realm of all things are divided into four levels: the early stage, the middle stage, the late stage, and the peak, the body of the Golden Crow Palace Lord has entered the realm of all things, then it belongs to the peak level, the Qinglong Palace Lord belongs to the late stage, the True Martial Palace Lord and the Vermilion Bird Palace Lord belong to the middle stage, and the Heavenly Wolf Palace Lord and the Starry Sky Palace Lord belong to the early stage.

But the five palace masters can unite, even with a half-step domain ancestor at the level of the Golden Crow Palace Lord, they can fight for a while, although they are not opponents, they can barely compete for a while.

Therefore, they believed that the five palace masters had joined forces to intercept and kill a supreme Dao ancestor, and if they couldn't succeed, they would simply commit suicide.

The newly born Forbidden Void Realm, Ye Tian soon came here, according to the plan, he began to collect forbidden strange things, everything was very normal.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to feel a strange atmosphere.

"It's coming!"

Under the shroud of the copying talent, he felt the existence of five half-step domain ancestors.

And one by one, the identities of the five Dao Ancestors were revealed.

"The Green Dragon Palace Lord, the True Martial Palace Lord, the Vermilion Bird Palace Lord, the Heavenly Wolf Palace Lord, and the Starry Sky Palace Lord, it's really a big deal, they sent five half-step domain ancestors to attack and kill me at once, and even the powerful half-step domain ancestors like the Blue Dragon Palace Lord were sent, they really look up to me!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, he also knew that the Heavenly Emperor Palace was to ensure 100% success in assassinating him, and he didn't necessarily really look up to him.

After all, the Heavenly Emperor Palace didn't want to fail either.

Ye Tiandang didn't notice their existence and continued to move forward, looking for forbidden and strange things.

At the moment when Ye Tian found a top-level forbidden strange object and was about to collect it, the Blue Dragon Palace Lord and they launched an attack.

Rumble!!!!

The True Martial Palace Lord, Vermilion Bird Palace Lord, Heavenly Wolf Palace Lord, and Starry Sky Palace Lord all blocked the void and suppressed Ye Tian, while the Blue Dragon Palace Lord launched a killing blow.

A ray of light pierced through in an instant, and the power was enough to seriously injure the weaker half-step domain ancestor, if it was a half-step domain ancestor with poor life-saving ability, I am afraid that it could be killed with a single blow.

"Nine Pole Armor!"

Ye Tian urged this defensive forbidden Dao technique.

Boom!

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord's Attack Forbidden Dao Technique bombarded the Nine Pole Armor, but it didn't break Ye Tian's defense, it just made Ye Tian take a few steps back.

Seeing that Ye Tian was fine, the Qinglong Palace Lord was shocked.

"How so, how can you be okay?"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord couldn't believe it.

Soon, he found that Ye Tian had broken through and was no longer a supreme Dao Ancestor, but an invincible Dao Ancestor.

"Damn, he broke through!"

The Vermilion Bird Palace Lord said coldly.

"Kill him at all costs, this is the best opportunity, if you miss it, it will be difficult to kill him!"

The main road of the Qinglong Palace.

Immediately, the five palace masters burst out with all their strength one by one, and one by one the forbidden weapons were revealed, and all kinds of secret treasures were urged one by one.

At the same time, they were holding five Heavenly Emperor Weapons and other big killing weapons, vowing to kill Ye Tian.

"You can't kill me with you!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

I saw Ye Tian holding the Heaven Killing Spear, poked it lightly, and silently attacked the weaker Heavenly Wolf Palace Master.

This blow directly hit the Heavenly Wolf Palace Lord hard, piercing his body.

"You're the Dark King!"

The main team of the Qinglong Palace was confirmed, because the Dark King would also have this forbidden Dao technique, anyone's forbidden Dao technique was the only one, and there was no forbidden Dao technique that two people would have exactly the same, so Ye Tiannai was undoubtedly the Dark King.

"Yes and what!"

Ye Tian didn't mean to hide it at all.

The attacks of the five palace masters were difficult to hurt Ye Tian at all, and any of Ye Tian's attacks could hurt them, especially the Heavenly Wolf Palace Lord, who was attacked by Ye Tian again and again, and the life-saving things were quickly exhausted.

The point is that Ye Tian's Forbidden Dao Technique Shadow Thorn is too difficult to defend against, and it arrives almost instantly, and it can't be defended at all.

Under a few attacks, the Heavenly Wolf Palace Lord was already seriously injured and dying!

"Heavenly Wolf Palace Master, you withdraw first!"

The main road of the Qinglong Palace.

The Heavenly Wolf Palace Lord nodded and hurriedly prepared to escape.

However, Ye Tian cast the Forbidden Dao Technique Shadow Escape to chase and kill the past, and once again cast the Shadow Thorn.

Under this blow, the Heavenly Wolf Palace Lord was on the verge of death.

He panicked!

"Qinglong Palace Master, save me!"

The Heavenly Wolf Palace Lord asked for help.

However, everything was useless, Ye Tian's shadow thorn was almost incomprehensible, and others couldn't intercept it.

Burst!

The Shadow Thorn pierced through the Heavenly Wolf Palace Lord's head, completely obliterating his last trace of life.

The Celestial Wolf Palace Lord has fallen!!!

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, you are looking for death!"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord was furious.

However, they are not Ye Tian's opponents at all, Ye Tian's strength is probably still above the Golden Crow Palace Lord, and the five palace masters are not Ye Tian's opponents when they join forces, not to mention that now there are only four palace masters left.

If it weren't for the fact that they were still holding the Heavenly Emperor Palace, their combat power had been increased, otherwise they would have collapsed and died long ago.

Soon, the Starry Sky Palace Master was also seriously injured by Ye Tian.

At this time, the Qinglong Palace Lord knew that the interception plan had completely failed.

The current plan is to let a half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm come over and kill Ye Tian, the ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao, unless there is no other way, because the Golden Crow Palace Lord is not Ye Tian's opponent!

Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

The Xuan Turtle Palace Lord flew out of the Heavenly Emperor Palace and headed to the Forbidden Void Realm, preparing to support the Blue Dragon Palace Lord and them.

But not long after the Xuangui Palace Master flew out of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, he was stopped by a person.

"Your Excellency is the Xuangui Palace Master of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, where is this going?"

The man spoke.

"Who is Your Excellency?"

The Xuan Turtle Palace Lord frowned.

He didn't know each other, but the hostility of the other party was obvious.

"Black Wind Mountain, Flame Crack Dao Ancestor!"

Yan Crack Dao Ancestor said with a smile.

"Black Wind Mountain's Flame Crack Dao Ancestor, what are you stopping me about?"

Xuangui Dao Ancestor asked.

"It's nothing, it's just that the half-step domain ancestor of your Heavenly Emperor Palace intercepted and killed our invincible Dao Ancestor of Black Wind Mountain, let's not talk about such a shameless thing, if we don't support Black Wind Mountain, your Heavenly Emperor Palace will not be able to support either!"

Flame Crack Dao Ancestor said coldly.

Ye Tian was immediately informed of the Black Wind Mountain when he was attacked, so the Black Wind Mountain also knew about the situation.

Therefore, Black Wind Mountain's current task is to stop the other half-step domain ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

As one of the half-step domain ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain Ten Thousand Realm, it was naturally necessary for him to stop the Xuan Turtle Dao Ancestor, who was also a half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm.
